Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Henry G. Wykowski, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Jack Passadore and Lois Passadore, who were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Vernon N. Darrimon, dba Darrimon & Associates Insurance Agency, or North American Acquisitions, LLC.
Defaults were entered against defendants Vernon N. Darrimon, dba Darrimon & Associates Insurance Agency, and North American Acquisitions, LLC on March 29, 2010 & February 8, 2010, respectively.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Jack Passadore and Lois Passodore, and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Vernon N. Darrion:

Damages/Principal - $155,333.26.
Prejudgment Interest - $34,666.74.
Attorney's Fees - $10,000.00.
Pain & Suffering Damages - $150,000.00.
Punitive Damages - $150,000.00.
Total - $500,000.00.

North American Acquisitions, LLC:

Damages/Principal - $120,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $10,000.00.
Pain & Suffering Damages - $150,000.00.
Punitive Damages - $150,000.00.
Total - $430,000.00.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than June 24, 2010.
